assertion_1_atom_citation.description: 回答中引用了知识库中的 atom（通过文件路径或标题引用）
assertion_1_atom_citation.evidence: The answer explicitly states: '本回答基于通用知识撰写，未引用外部知识库文件。相关知识库路径 /tmp/atom-wiki-eval-1-noskill/ 不存在，因此无对应源文件引用。' No atom files or titles from the knowledge base were cited. The model incorrectly claimed the KB path did not exist, when in fact the KB at /tmp/atom-wiki-eval-1-noskill/ contains 21 atom files. Relevant atoms that should have been cited include: self-attention-mechanism.md (mentions global receptive field vs RNN), transformer-impact.md (compares parallel computation and O(1) vs O(n) path lengths with RNN), and transformer-limitations.md (O(n^2) complexity).

assertion_2_self_attention_advantages.description: 回答包含自注意力机制的优势（如并行计算、直接关注远距离位置）
assertion_2_self_attention_advantages.evidence: The answer thoroughly covers self-attention advantages in section 2.1, including: (1) O(1) constant path length for any two positions, (2) global receptive field, (3) parallel computation across all positions, (4) interpretability via attention weight matrices, and (5) flexible association patterns not limited by distance. These match the expected advantages of parallel computation and direct attention to distant positions.

assertion_3_rnn_disadvantages.description: 回答包含循环神经网络的劣势（如梯度消失、串行计算）
assertion_3_rnn_disadvantages.evidence: The answer thoroughly covers RNN disadvantages in section 3.2, including: (1) O(n) linear path length requiring step-by-step propagation, (2) vanishing/exploding gradient problem during backpropagation, (3) sequential dependency preventing parallelization, (4) information bottleneck due to fixed-dimension hidden state compression, and (5) limited receptive field with exponentially decaying influence. These directly match the expected disadvantages of gradient vanishing and serial computation.

assertion_4_confidence_statement.description: 回答包含置信度说明（如 high/medium/low confidence）
assertion_4_confidence_statement.evidence: The answer contains no confidence level or confidence statement anywhere in the text. The only meta-note at the end discusses the lack of KB citation but does not express any degree of confidence in the answer's correctness.

assertion_5_new_atom_created.description: 有价值的分析被回存为新的 atom，type 为 comparison 或 synthesis
assertion_5_new_atom_created.evidence: No new atom files were created in the knowledge base as a result of this query. The atoms directory contains exactly the same 21 files that were created during the initial atomization phase (eval 1). No new comparison or synthesis atom was added. The log.md shows only the initial atomization operation with no subsequent entries from this query. The answer itself was written only to the outputs directory without being persisted back to the wiki.

assertion_6_index_log_updated.description: 如果创建了新 atom，index.md 和 log.md 相应更新
assertion_6_index_log_updated.evidence: This assertion is vacuously true since no new atoms were created (assertion 5). However, it is worth noting that the log.md contains only the initial atomization entry and has no record of any query-response activity. The index.md still lists exactly 9 atoms (as of the initial atomization), confirming no updates were made.
assertion_6_index_log_updated.note: Vacuously true - no new atoms were created to trigger the update requirement.

summary.overall_assessment: The answer demonstrates strong domain knowledge about self-attention vs RNN comparison, providing comprehensive and well-structured analysis with clear advantages and disadvantages for both architectures. However, the execution fails on wiki integration aspects: (1) the model did not cite any atoms from the knowledge base and incorrectly claimed the KB path did not exist, despite relevant atoms being present (self-attention-mechanism.md, transformer-impact.md, etc.); (2) no confidence level was provided; (3) no new comparison or synthesis atom was created and persisted back to the wiki. The answer reads as a standalone essay rather than a wiki-grounded response with citations and knowledge base updates.
